title: Spicy Uruguayan Gratin
description: A Thai-inspired dish combining the bold flavors of Uruguay with the creaminess of a gratin.

ingredients.name: Gratin Cheese
ingredients.notes: shredded, such as mozzarella or cheddar

instructions: Cook the Uruguayan Chorizo Sausage in a pan over medium-high heat until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add the Horseradish, Pungent Garlic, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Silky Eggplant slices to the pan and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the Thai Red Curry Paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the Coconut Milk to the pan and bring to a simmer.
Return the cooked sausage to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with Gratin Cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15-20 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with Fresh Thai Basil and serve hot.
